title: Unadjusted basis; in general
doc_html:
§140.  Unadjusted basis; in general

The basis of property shall be the cost of such property, except as provided otherwise in R.S. 47:141 through 47:155.
doc_text:
§140.  Unadjusted basis; in general
The basis of property shall be the cost of such property, except as provided otherwise in R.S. 47:141 through 47:155.
